market_summary: Asian markets rebounded on March 24, 2026, amid optimism regarding potential de-escalation in the US-Iran conflict following statements from President Trump. Nikkei 225 rose 1.1%, Hang Seng 2.2%, and Kospi 2.7%.
art_highlight: Art Basel Hong Kong is underway (March 24-29), featuring 240 galleries. New exhibits include work by Anchi Lin and collaborative shows by Lin & Lin Gallery and Eslite Gallery.
